log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Loxodon — Winged Striker (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Loxodon — Winged Striker
→ Bite: [d20:10+10=20 vs AC 15] HIT! 22 damage. Loxodon — Winged Striker HP: 45/67
→ Bite: [d20:8+10=18 vs AC 15] HIT! 17 damage. Loxodon — Winged Striker HP: 28/67
→ Bite: [d20:17+10=27 vs AC 15] HIT! 18 damage. Loxodon — Winged Striker HP: 10/67
--- Loxodon — Winged Striker --- HP: 10/67 | AC: 15
REASONING: HP CRITICAL (10/67). Going invisible for survival.
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Loxodon — Winged Striker is affected by Greater Invisibility.
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Loxodon — Winged Striker (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Loxodon — Winged Striker
→ Bite: [d20:9+10=19 vs AC 15] HIT! 21 damage. Loxodon — Winged Striker HP: -11/67
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Greater Invisibility ends!

--- Loxodon — Winged Striker --- HP: 51/67 | AC: 15
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:9+4=13 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ 1/1 targets affected.
══ ROUND 2 ══

** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
--- Loxodon — Winged Striker --- HP: 51/67 | AC: 15 | Conc: Hypnotic Pattern
REASONING: All 1 enemies disabled by Hypnotic Pattern. Dodging to maintain concentration.
ACTION: Dodge. Attacks against have disadvantage.
